headline: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Stock Still Looks Cheap Following Raised 2026 Outlook
summary: UnitedHealth Group stock has delivered a 54.8% return over the past year, yet the broader valuation checks point to a mixed picture rather than a straightforward bargain or clear overvaluation. UnitedHealth Group's 54.8% gain over the last 12 months puts recent buyers in a strong position, but it also raises the bar for what counts as good value from here. On the positive side, recent earnings strength and margin improvements can support the case that the current price still reflects...
